supported_devices: Bluelab Peridoser peristaltic pumps or solenoid valves for nutrient A, B, and pH dosing
port_types: BNC (pH probe), EC probe connector, temperature probe connector, 2x solenoid/pump outputs, alarm and external lockout terminals (NC and NO contacts)
compatible_sensors: Bluelab pH probe (BNC, with ATC), Bluelab conductivity probe, temperature probe
supported_manufacturer_series: Bluelab Peridoser triple peristaltic kit, Bluelab Solenoid Kit
recommended_use_note: Legacy commercial hydroponic dosing controller for pH and EC; 3-part (A, B, pH) dosing via peristaltic pumps or solenoid valves; suitable for large reservoir management
uvp_notes: £1,800 GBP for controller only at UK retailer; complete kit with Peridoser listed at £3,260.95 (1-hydroponics.co.uk); French retailer listed Peridoser kit at €2,000. Product appears discontinued — prices reflect remaining stock.
notes: Appears discontinued: no longer listed on Bluelab official EU or US webstores. 20+ year legacy product being replaced by the IntelliDose. Supports both Peridoser (peristaltic) and Solenoid Kit dosing configurations. Has Normally Closed and Normally Open external lockout contact inputs; selectable internal lockouts (e.g. temperature high alarm can prevent dosing). Dosing OnTime adjustable 1 second to 10 minutes. Large numeric display with adjustable brightness. EC range 0.0–5.0, pH 0.0–14.0, temp 0–50°C.
